article.title: FPA asks foodservice packaging businesses to contact MPs about pEPR issues
article.summary:
The Foodservice Packaging Association (FPA) is calling on sector businesses to contact their local MPs to highlight concerns about how the UK’s Packaging Extended Producer Responsibility (pEPR) scheme is operating in practice. 
The post FPA asks foodservice packaging businesses to contact MPs about pEPR issues appeared first on Packaging News.

post_text:
A new report highlights exactly what we at NBB work with every day: making industrial packaging part of the solution, not the problem.

FPA asks foodservice packaging businesses to contact MPs about pEPR issues

This confirms a growing trend — companies are now actively seeking packaging that supports the circular economy. At NBB, we already have the answer.

Quality and durability — NBB's bigbags are built to last, even in the most demanding industrial environments.

Bigbags are not just storage. They are a choice about what kind of industry we want to be part of.

Curious about what the right bigbag solution can do for your business? Reach out — we are happy to advise.

#bigbags #circulareconomy #greentransition #sustainableindustry #NBB
